label: Macro_2
evidence: Reynolds 2021 main text: 'Mac2 is characterized by the expression of F13A1 and transcription factors associated with alternative activation and suppression of immune responses (NR4A1, NR4A2, KLF4) and notably, is more closely aligned with fetal macrophages.' Macro_2 in Gopee 2024 corresponds to Mac2 in Reynolds 2021.
